basic_details.job_title: IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 17 August 2026 at the IARI office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 35 years for Project Associate-I (Age relaxation of 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST/Women candidates as per Government of India rules).
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for Project Associate-I. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates, 5 years for SC/ST/Women candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. or M.Tech (including Integrated M.Tech 4+2) in Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Plant Biochemistry/ Life Sciences/ Food Science or relevant discipline from a recognized university. NET/GATE not mandatory.
qualification.details: M.Sc. or M.Tech (including Integrated M.Tech 4+2) in Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Plant Biochemistry/ Life Sciences/ Food Science or relevant discipline from a recognized university. NET/GATE not mandatory. Experience in food biochemistry, extrusion/functional analysis, biochemical techniques etc.

content_sections.heading: IARI Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IARI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IARI Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. or M.Tech (including Integrated M.Tech 4+2) in Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Plant Biochemistry/ Life Sciences/ Food Science or relevant discipline from a recognized university. NET/GATE not mandatory. Experience in food biochemistry, extrusion/functional analysis, biochemical techniques etc.

content_sections.heading: IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 35 years for Project Associate-I. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates, 5 years for SC/ST/Women candidates as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IARI Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IARI recruitment is Junior Research Fellow. This is a contract-based research position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the IARI Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The application process is via walk-in interview. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 17 August 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or M.Tech (including Integrated M.Tech 4+2) in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Plant Biochemistry, Life Sciences, Food Science, or a relevant discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for this position?
faq.answer: No, NET/GATE qualification is not mandatory for the Junior Research Fellow position at IARI.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of ₹37,000/- per month along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for Project Associate-I. Age relaxation is applicable for OBC, SC, ST, and Women candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the IARI Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates need to attend a walk-in interview at the specified venue with all required original documents and self-attested copies.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Division of Biochemistry, ICAR-IARI, Pusa Campus, New Delhi - 110012.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry their bio-data, self-attested copies of certificates and mark sheets (10th, 12th, Graduation, Post-Graduation), and any other relevant certificates like experience or NET/GATE/BET if applicable. A passport-size photograph is also required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this IARI recruitment is contract-based, indicating a temporary engagement for a specific project duration.
